creator: pdemon@gmail.com
text:
Hi Yuri,

Originally yes it was a fork of the following repository:
https://github.com/fac/auth-script-openvpn

I actually manually forked my own repo when I made the version which is used for this repository so I could change the name - github doesn't allow forking your own repositories in the interface and apparently doesn't track it when it's done manually.

Here's my fork of the original: https://github.com/pdemonaco/auth-script-openvpn

And here's the variant I made to actually maintain as a source for the port: https://github.com/pdemonaco/openvpn-auth-script

Phil
